title: andryala ragusina var. minor
intro: Andryala ragusina var. minor, also known as Rock Rose, is a type of plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of gastrointestinal issues and respiratory problems. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which provide relief from coughs, colds, and other respiratory issues, while also aiding in the digestion process. Rock Rose can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for various forms of consumption and treatment.
